_comment: Energy category — EcoFlow. Everything here is specific to this sponsor/category. FFM facts live in data/global.json.
name: EcoFlow

meta.title: Focus Finder Media — EcoFlow Sponsorship Deck
meta.description: A scroll-driven look at the EcoFlow x Focus Finder Media partnership.

lines: and the stories that happen there.

challenge.label: The Challenge
challenge.heading:
Four days. Zero grid.
Everything still has to run.
challenge.quote: "Without power, none of this runs. Without any of this running, there is no film, and without the film, there's no audience to reach."

solution.label: The Solution
solution.heading:
EcoFlow is the
mission's power layer.
solution.sub: Four days off-grid means every camera, drone, and drive depends on one thing staying alive. The DELTA Pro 3 is the hub that keeps the entire kit running.
solution.line2: No power, no cameras. No cameras, no film. EcoFlow is what keeps this expedition shootable from sunrise to sunrise.

partnership.heading: Powering the story is more powerful than sponsoring it.
paragraphs: People don't follow us for product placements. They follow us for the places we go, the stories we tell, and the experiences we share.

This expedition gets documented exactly like every other adventure we post: raw, real, and as it happens. EcoFlow shows up naturally in that content, on camera when it's keeping us running, in the Stories where we're actually using it, because that's the kind of thing our audience already asks us about.

finalAsk.heading:
The story exists.
The audience exists.
Now we need the power.
finalAsk.paragraph: Every story needs a catalyst. This expedition runs on power. The content runs on curiosity. The audience runs on inspiration.
